channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Summer TA Hours
item.description: Wednesdays : 3-8pm (Ballroom, Student Union) Need some support with your summer classes? Drop by your TA’s office hours in the Student Union for extra help, then recharge with fun mental floss activities from the Center of Gravity! View the full schedule here: https://successcenter.rpi.edu/tutoring
item.author: Students

item.title: Add a Little Whimsy to Your Study Routine: Silent Reads @ Folsom Library
item.description: Join RPI Libraries for Silent Reads — a relaxed, low-pressure gathering where people read together in silence. No discussions, no pressure, just a calm space to settle in with a good book or some coursework. Bring anything you like to read: a graphic novel, an audiobook, a research article, or that novel you’ve been meaning to start for months. Not sure what to bring? Check out our new books (we are a library after all). Free snacks and beverages provided. Drop in, recharge, and bring a friend.
item.author: Community

item.title: Shows Announced! TOPOS 2026 Music Festival | September 2–5
item.description: Date: Monday, June 8, 2026 (all day) - Every TOPOS 2026 presentation is a way into our own stories, and of those around us. Featuring Vijay Iyer, Wadada Leo Smith, Miho Hatori, Edward George, Paul Abbott, IMA, Rock City Falls Trio (Improv Spaces), Sun Dogs (Improv Spaces), Fred Moten, and The Silent Light—TOPOS 2026 brings together different forms of music, not as genres but as provocative sites of experience. A free BBQ at EMPAC keeps the conversation going! Find the full festival schedule,…
item.author: Community

item.title: Cogswell Chiller Plant Crane Operations Scheduled for June 11
item.description: On Thursday, June 11, 2026, a crane will be on-site at the Cogswell Chiller Plant to remove the old North Side Cooling Towers. No parking or deliveries will be permitted in the work area for the duration of the day. The crane will be staged on the loading dock side of Cogswell Laboratory adjacent to the parking garage. Thank you for your cooperation.
item.author: Community

item.title: FY27 and FY28 Holiday Schedules Now Available
item.description: The Fiscal Year 2027 and Fiscal Year 2028 holiday schedules are now available on the Human Resources Website. Employees are encouraged to review the schedules, including holiday observances and Winter Break/Employee Appreciation Days, to assist with personal and departmental planning.
item.author: Community

item.title: Final Call for Fall 2026 NRB Beyond Blocks
item.description:
Through Beyond Blocks, students participate in open houses, club fairs, workshops, and social events that help them stay connected, get involved, and thrive in their new environment. Submit an event: https://surveys.rpi.edu/jfe/form/SV_ers5JWvVJ7QSmjQ Questions? Contact fye@rpi.edu

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
